name: RENAL ANATOMY
definition: central core of medullary tissue enveloped by 1.04 ± 0.22 branching of main renal artery prior to reaching hilum tiny vessels perfusing the renal capsule coursing tangentially to renal margin vessel with the greatest diameter vessel with smaller diameter segmental artery originating from aorta / iliac a. segmental artery arising from superior mesenteric artery / internal spermatic artery
dominant_finding: separation of upper + lower groups of calices
distribution: indentation of cortical contour + echogenic line (= interrenicular septum = junctional
discriminating_features: separation of upper + lower groups of calices
indentation of cortical contour + echogenic line (= interrenicular septum = junctional
ren lobatus (= interlobar surface grooves) present in fetus and infant, rare in adulthood
assimilation of independent lobes > 28 weeks GA makes renal surface smoother
cortex may be more echogenic than adjacent normal liver / spleen

general: separation of upper + lower groups of calices
indentation of cortical contour + echogenic line (= interrenicular septum = junctional
ren lobatus (= interlobar surface grooves) present in fetus and infant, rare in adulthood
assimilation of independent lobes > 28 weeks GA makes renal surface smoother
cortex may be more echogenic than adjacent normal liver / spleen

may be misinterpreted as dilated calices / renal cystic disease
